## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Kirsten Dieter for the Account Executive role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Candidate Profile:** Kirsten Dieter's career shows a pattern of short tenures at unstable startups (e.g., product-market fit issues, leadership turnover), driving a search for a stable, long-term role.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Critical Need:** GrowthX's primary challenge is not pipeline generation (which is abundant), but scaling delivery capacity by improving sales qualification to ensure the right customer fit.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Core Skillset:** Dieter's experience building sales processes (e.g., a choreographed demo at HowSo) and her deep knowledge of Clay for sales automation directly address GrowthX's need for process-building.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [**Role Alignment:** The role requires a collaborative partner focused on process improvement over immediate quota attainment. Dieter confirmed this focus aligns with her goals.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2429.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Core Challenge & Role Requirements

  - [**Problem:** Abundant inbound pipeline (from Marcel's network) exceeds delivery capacity, creating a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=3161.0)
  - [**Solution:** Improve sales qualification to select the right customers and build scalable processes to support the transition from services to SaaS.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Role Focus:** The new AE must be a collaborative partner focused on process improvement, not just closing deals.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2429.0)
      - [**Key Attributes:** Initiative, curiosity, selflessness, and adaptability.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2745.0)
  - [**Ramp-Up:** \~1 month for calls, but building the sales playbook (e.g., demos, partnership docs) is a collaborative, ongoing task.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2855.0)
  - [**Compensation:** Patience is required; the focus is on long-term success over immediate quota attainment.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2800.0)
  - [**Territories:** No predefined territories initially; the team will collaborate to ensure fair deal distribution.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=3043.0)

### Candidate Background & Motivation

  - [**Career Pattern:** Short tenures at startups driven by instability and a lack of growth paths.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Pecan AI:** Left for a leadership path, returned to find the company in crisis (layoffs, PMF issues).](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
      - [**Sorbet:** Head of Sales; left due to a non-viable product with no PMF.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [**HowSo:** Left due to a lack of GTM support from a non-sales manager.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [**OmniKey:** Left after a promotion revealed significant internal chaos (high leadership turnover, CS team walkout).](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [**Current Focus:** Freelancing and mastering Clay for B2B sales automation (TAM mapping, personalized outreach).](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [**Motivation:** Seeking a stable, long-term role where she can apply her process-building skills.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

### Relevant Experience & Process-Building

  - [**HowSo (Sales Process Redesign):**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
      - [**Problem:** Demos were too technical, focusing on models instead of business value.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
      - [**Solution:** Built a choreographed sales process with a Sales Engineer.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
          - [**Process:** Discovery → Deep Dive (to uncover metrics) → Choreographed Demo → ROI Summary.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
          - [**Result:** Reframed the narrative around business value, not technical specs.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [**OmniKey (Custom Demo Process):**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [**Problem:** Generic demos were ineffective.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [**Solution:** Created a custom demo process using a prospect's own assets to show platform value.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [**Result:** Helped close multiple deals, some without a pilot.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)

### Deal Examples

  - [**OmniKey (Pest Control Company):**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
      - [**Context:** A prospect outside the typical ICP (pest control) needed commercial leads.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Positioned OmniKey as a data-driven service that analyzes ad performance to generate better creative.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Closed an annual $5k/month contract without a pilot, replacing the standard $2.5k/month pilot.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2134.0)
      - [**Learning:** Failed to uncover a key stakeholder (a newly hired performance agency) during discovery, delaying onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2229.0)
  - [**Early Career (Furniture Company):**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Used loss aversion by showing a local furniture store zero Google AdWords presence for its products, while competitors ranked.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Closed the deal in one week.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Provide feedback to the team.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=3261.0)
  - [**Bridget/Tucker:** Schedule the next interview with Bridget.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xb2M7fqZDyMhr8pqNUBnQjFXEjqd_s?tab=summary&timestamp=3261.0)
